events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Buenos Aires with Caesar Augustus Rodney presenting credentials as Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Caesar Augustus Rodney, Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1823-01-27. Credentials presented: 1823-12-27. Died at post on 1824-06-10. Note: Commissioned as Minister Plenipotentiary to Buenos Aires.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated from Legation to Embassy with Frederic Jesup Stimson presenting credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Frederic Jesup Stimson, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1914-10-01. Credentials presented: 1915-01-08. Left post on 1921-04-21.
